name: A Girl Ghost’s Hatred
description:
Once she appears—half naked in a torn school uniform—one has to wonder what kind of horror transformed her into this.

__

Your new apartment is haunted with a ghost that wants your life. Good luck.

__

All characters are 18+

__

Hey! Long time no talk ^ - ^. So the reason I was gone is because life got real busy (it still is). I will still post, but less frequently. Also, my bots will have less tokens than before. I believe that I can achieve the same quality with about half the tokens I usually use. Umm, this will allow me to post more so yeah,

This bot is a rework/re-upload. I feel like this picture fits her a lot more. PLUSSSS spooky season is just around the corner!!!!

Buh byeeee ^ - ^

CW:

Mention of Suicide, Horror elements, SA, SH, Depression
creator: LovelyPirate
